libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No special runtime setup is indicated. Generated Scala tests should exercise the marshalling/unmarshalling abstractions directly and match the RC3 API signatures; for example, use FromInput.seqInput as SeqFromInput or use FromInput.iterableInput when an IterableFromInput is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8717 [Automation] java run fails for org.sangria-graphql:sangria-marshalling-api_3:1.1.0-RC3; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure appears to be a source/API compatibility issue in the existing test code, not missing setup.
RC3 is built with Scala 3.4.3, so local Gradle/Scala compiler resolution remains authoritative if TASTy or signature compatibility issues appear.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; the artifact is a pure Scala marshalling API with only scala3-library as a runtime dependency and meaningful coverage is reachable through in-memory API tests.
